rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Payload collections live in src/collections/ with a .ts extension and export a typed config object with a slug constant.","scope":"payload collections"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Setting auth: true on a Payload collection automatically adds email (unique), hash, and salt fields — do NOT redefine them manually.","scope":"payload auth collection"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The admin auth collection is configured in payload.config.ts via the admin.user property, referenced as Users.slug rather than a hardcoded string.","scope":"payload.config.ts"}]}
